zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Bayern於1227年出生在德國貝也時，她的父親Otto II von Bayern21歲，母親Agnes von Braunschweig26歲。她於1246年9月1日與Conrad IV在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1273年10月9日在波蘭享年46歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Bayern于1227年出生在德国貝也时，她的父亲Otto II von Bayern21岁，母亲Agnes von Braunschweig26岁。她于1246年9月1日与Conrad IV在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1273年10月9日在波兰享年46岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German (and possibly also Dutch)   Bayer   or   Beyers  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Byers  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Bayern was born in 1227, in Bavaria, Germany, her father, Otto II von Bayern, was 21 and her mother, Agnes von Braunschweig, was 26. She married Conrad IV on 1 September 1246, in Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 9 October 1273, in Poland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Bayern est née en 1227, à Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Otto II von Bayern, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Braunschweig, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Conrad IV le 1 septembre 1246, à Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 octobre 1273, à Pologne, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Bayern 1227 in Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto II von Bayern 21 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Braunschweig 26. Sie hat am 1. September 1246 in Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland Conrad IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 9. Oktober 1273 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Polen und wurde in Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Bayern è nata il nel 1227 nel Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Otto II von Bayern, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Braunschweig, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Conrad IV il 1 settembre 1246, nel Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 ottobre 1273, nel Polonia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Bayernが1227年にドイツバイエルンで生まれた時，父Otto II von Bayernは21歳，母Agnes von Braunschweigは26歳であった。1246年9月1日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムボhブルグ アン ダー ドナウでConrad IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1273年10月9日にポーランドで46歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムシェイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Hohenberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 슈wa비슈 홀 울퍼츠하우센 호헨버그

ko.Vohburg. Herzogtum Bayern: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 보h버그 앤 데르 도나
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Bayern(이)가 1227년 독일 베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto II von Bayern(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Braunschweig(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1246년 9월 1일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 보h버그 앤 데르 도나에서 Conrad IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 10월 9일 폴란드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Bayern nasceu em 1227, em Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto II von Bayern, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Braunschweig, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Conrad IV em 1 de setembro de 1246, em Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1273, em Polônia, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Bayern родилась в 1227 г. в местности беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto II von Bayern было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Braunschweig, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conrad IV 1 сентября 1246 г. в местности фохбург ан дир донау, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 9 октября 1273 г. в местности Польша в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности щиирн, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Bayern nació en 1227, en Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Otto II von Bayern, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes von Braunschweig, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Conrad IV el 1 de septiembre de 1246, en Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1273, en Polonia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania.
